name: openclaw-search-skills
summary: OpenClaw skills for multi-source search and reporting
description: Automated Skill Tree audit for blessonism/openclaw-search-skills. Source category: research-search.

summary: Overall risk assessed as HIGH based on static repository inspection.
Repository contains outbound network request patterns that should be reviewed.
Repository can write, modify, or delete local files.
Repository invokes shell / subprocess style execution paths.
Repository references credential-like or sensitive filesystem locations.
